title: hemiphues bellidioides var. suffocata
intro: Hemiphues bellidioides var. suffocata, commonly known as the Southern Ranges Hemiphues, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemiphues bellidioides var. suffocata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
